title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Swiggy Restaurant Partners Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Swiggy Restaurant Partners Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Swiggy Restaurant Partners Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Jaipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Swiggy Restaurant Partners Advisory Limited:
Swiggy Restaurant Partners Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy Restaurant Partners Advisory Limited!
